polymarket.title: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the July 2026 meeting?
Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25 bps after the July 2026 meeting?
Will the U.S. invade Iran before 2027?
Will Mojtaba Khamenei be head of state in Iran end of 2026?
Will LeBron James play for the Golden State Warriors in 2026-27?
US x Iran Effective Ceasefire by July 24?
Will Oleksandr Syrskyi be out as Ukraine's Commander-in-Chief by July 31, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need to produce exactly ONE paragraph, starting with 'Bullish:', 'Bearish:', or 'Mixed:' followed by specific reasons. Must mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words.

We need to interpret overall market sentiment based on these prediction markets. The data includes Fed rates: high probability of no change (93%) vs increase 7% => suggests expectation of stable rates (bullish for equities? maybe neutral). US invade Iran before 2027: 26% chance (low). Mojtaba Khamenei head of state in Iran end 2026: 76% (high) suggests expectation of leadership continuity (maybe stable). LeBron James to Warriors: 12% low. US x Iran Effective Ceasefire by July 24: 10% low. Iran invades Kuwait by Aug 31: 3% very low. Oleksandr Syrskyi out as Ukraine Commander-in-Chief by July 31 2026: 65% chance (moderately high) suggests expectation of leadership change in Ukraine.

Overall sentiment: Mixed? There's expectation of stable Fed rates (bullish for markets), but also expectation of continued Iranian leadership (maybe geopolitical risk stable), low chance of US invasion of Iran, low chance of ceasefire, low chance of Iran invading Kuwait, moderate chance of Ukrainian commander change. So overall maybe cautiously
